title: Regex Grouper
purpose: Group strings with regex or extract matched fragments.

configFields.description: Regex flags string (example: g, i, m).
group = emit grouped matches; extract = emit selected capture on value output; extract_json = extract and parse JSON when possible.
first = one match per input string; first_overall = stop after the first match across all inputs; all = all matches per input string.
Selector used for grouping (group mode) or extraction (extract mode): match/0, capture index (1...), named group, groups, or captures.
Grouped output mode: object (Record) or array (list of groups).
If true, inputs that do not match are emitted under unmatchedKey.
Group key label for unmatched values.
If true, string inputs are split by newline into multiple items.
Optional sample text used for preview / AI prompt rendering.
Optional AI prompt template used to propose a regex.
Node output caching. auto = reuse when safe, force = always reuse, disabled = recompute each run.
If true, wait until all connected input ports have values before executing the node.

semanticNodeExample.title: Regex Grouper
semanticNodeExample.description: Group strings with regex or extract matched fragments.
